headline: GARCH estimates are exposed in full so you can read the result and reproduce it manually.

sections.title: What is shown on this page
items: Figures included: GARCH conditional volatility, GARCH forecast volatility.

sections.title: How to read the main result
items: Volatility persistence is reported directly in the metrics panel and should normally be below 1. Current value: n/a.
The parameter table is the formal estimation output; the volatility-path chart shows how conditional volatility evolves through the sample.
The forecast-volatility table and forecast chart extend the conditional variance path beyond the last observation.

sections.title: What a normal paper should report
items: A parameter table with omega, alpha, and beta terms.
A short discussion of persistence and forecasted volatility.

sections.title: Manual replication focus
items: Re-estimate the same ARCH/GARCH order on the downloaded return series.
Check whether alpha plus beta matches the reported persistence.
Recompute the forecast variance path and compare it step by step with the forecast table.
